hooks.command: FILE=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); EXT="${FILE##*.}"; cd "${PROJECT_ROOT:-.}"; case "$EXT" in ts|tsx|js|jsx) npx eslint --fix "$FILE" || true; npx prettier --write "$FILE" || true;; py) RUFF_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/ruff-cache ruff check --fix "$FILE" || true; RUFF_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/ruff-cache ruff format "$FILE" || true;; esac
